mapper.select: SELECT app.name AS app_name, app.number AS app_number, app.icon AS app_icon, cloud.number AS cloud_number FROM t_sys_app app LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud cloud ON cloud.id = app.cloud_id WHERE app.id = #{appId}

SELECT DISTINCT menu.* FROM t_sys_menu menu
INNER JOIN t_sys_role_perms role_perms ON role_perms.permission_id = menu.permission_id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role user_role ON user_role.role_id = role_perms.role_id
WHERE menu.app_id = #{appId} AND menu.level IN (2, 3) AND user_role.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY menu.level, menu.sort, menu.create_time
mapper.update: UPDATE t_sys_menu SET number = #{number}, name = #{name}, level = #{level}, parent_id = #{parentId}, app_id = #{appId}, permission_id = #{permissionId}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort}, enable_flag = #{enableFlag}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id}
